description: Style Note Lovely legs will look even better when wrapped up in these mircofibre tights from happy socks. If you want to wear a short skirt but aren't ready to bare all to the world, then pop on this pair from the brand who's aim is to bring happiness and quality to every corner of the world. Made in Italy, you can rely on a high level of quality as well as an impeccably fashionable look! Product Details 50 denier opaque tights in black with broad stripes in yellow, pink and blue and a comfortable elasticated waist Material and Care Microfibre Machine wash inside out Do not bleach, tumble dry or iron
